title: Engineering Mathematics – Unit 1: Matrices
description: Easy-to-understand notes on Matrices, Determinants and their applications. Covers all exam-important topics with solved examples.

title: Basic Civil Engineering – Building Materials
description: Syllabus-aligned notes on building materials including bricks, cement, steel, and timber. Ideal for 1st year Civil students.

title: C Programming – Unit 2: Control Structures
description: Clear notes on if-else, switch, loops and nested conditions in C. Includes flowcharts and sample programs.

title: Basic Electrical Engineering – Ohm's Law & Circuits
description: Simplified notes on Ohm's Law, Kirchhoff's laws, series and parallel circuits with diagrams and numerical problems.
